title: Soft Polish Potato Casserole
description: A hearty casserole filled with soft roasted polish potatoes, perfect for a comforting meal.
instructions: In a large saucepan, sauté the minced roasted garlic in melted butter until fragrant.
Add the sliced polish potatoes and cook until they start to brown.
Sprinkle the flour over the potatoes and cook for 1 minute.
Gradually add the milk, whisking continuously to avoid lumps.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until it thickens.
Stir in the shredded cheddar cheese until melted and smooth.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Transfer the potato mixture to a baking dish.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes or until the top is golden brown.
